---
title: "Natural Hazards and Disaster Management"
subtitle: "Understanding extreme events, vulnerability, and resilience strategies."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include natural-hazards/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Natural Hazards and Disaster Management** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include natural-hazards/01-hazards-vulnerability-risk.md >}}

{{< include natural-hazards/02-climate-change-impacts.md >}}

{{< include natural-hazards/03-types-of-disasters.md >}}

{{< include natural-hazards/04-disaster-management-framework.md >}}

---


---

## Quick Reference

{{< include natural-hazards/05-quick-reference.md >}}

---
